context_text: <B> scared of it and i have ah i have a niece who is probably creeping up on three and so you know so she's being brought up on computers you know what i'm saying so { she } / <A> [ really ] / <B> she's around it everyday so by the time she gets you know a couple more years two or three more years whatever she's in first grade you know she's you know she'll know the basics i'm { assuming } / <A> [ mhm ] / <B> you know she'll know what it is and how to navigate and at least try to find out where the games are so / <A> yeah / <B> yeah so i agree it has its place in in in education obviously so / <A> mhm / <B> ah computer science major i guess / <A> okay
